sql: SELECT id, name, amount FROM orders WHERE status = #{status} AND user_id IN (#{userIds}) ORDER BY created_at DESC
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, amount FROM orders
<where>
    <if test="status != null">
        AND status = #{status}
    </if>
    <if test="userIds != null and userIds.size() > 0">
        AND user_id IN
        <foreach collection="userIds" item="uid" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{uid}
        </foreach>
    </if>
</where>
ORDER BY created_at DESC
